listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #624
listings.description: 24/7 Love's travel stop on I-65 at Exit 8 in the Mobile/Prichard area. Confirmed truck parking (73 spaces), 7 showers, RFID fueling, DEF, Subway and Chester's. Has on-site CAT scale and Love's Truck Tire Care (listed as separate rows).
listings.corroboration: Address, phone, exit 8, store #624 and amenities consistent across Love's official location/news pages, FindTruckService, TruckStopsAndServices and Yelp. Official loves.com blocked by egress policy for direct fetch; corroborated via 4+ independent sources.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #624, Prichard
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #624, I-65 Exit 8, Prichard (Mobile area).
listings.corroboration: CAT scale presence at Love's #624 confirmed by Love's location listing and multiple truck-service directories. catscale.com locator blocked by egress policy; corroborated by 3 independent sources.

listings.name: Love's Truck Tire Care #624, Prichard
listings.description: Love's Truck Tire Care center co-located at Love's #624, I-65 Exit 8. Offers tire selection/repair, light mechanical, oil change and roadside assistance. Truck care hours reported approx. 6 a.m.-11 p.m.
listings.corroboration: Love's Truck Tire Care at #624 confirmed by 4RoadService, FindTruckService and BFGoodrich dealer locator. Corroborated by 3 independent sources.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #75
listings.description: Pilot Travel Center on I-65 at Exit 19 (US-43, Satsuma/Creola area). Confirmed truck parking, on-site CAT scale (separate row), 10 diesel lanes, 8 showers, Arby's, laundry, bulk DEF. Reported ~125 total parking spaces.
listings.corroboration: Address (6109 US-43 S), phone, exit 19, store #75 and amenities consistent across Pilot official location page, FindTruckService, TruckStopsAndServices and ParkAdvisor. Official Pilot page blocked for direct fetch; corroborated by 4 sources. Truck-specific space count not isolated from the ~125 total, left blank.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #75, Satsuma
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #75, I-65 Exit 19, Satsuma.
listings.corroboration: CAT scale at Pilot #75 confirmed by FindTruckService, TruckStopsAndServices and ParkAdvisor. catscale.com locator blocked; corroborated by 3 independent sources.

listings.name: Creek Travel Plaza (Creek Travel Stores - Poarch)
listings.description: Full-service 24/7 travel plaza on I-65 at Exit 54 in Atmore, owned/operated by the Poarch Band of Creek Indians (CIEDA). Confirmed 88 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 4 showers, 24-hour diner with southern fare, laundry, RV dump, propane, ATM and shuttle to/from Wind Creek Casino.
listings.corroboration: Address, phone, exit 54, 24/7 status and amenities consistent across the official Creek Travel Plaza site, TruckStopsAndServices, ParkAdvisor, Yelp (updated 2026) and Roadtrippers. Operating status current (Yelp updated Mar 2026). Corroborated by 5 sources.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #225
listings.description: 24/7 Love's travel stop on I-65 at Exit 93 (US-84, Evergreen) at the northern edge of the segment. Confirmed ~90 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, on-site CAT scale and Love's Truck Care (separate rows), showers, deli, DEF.
listings.corroboration: Address (16101 Hwy 84), phone, exit 93, store #225 and amenities consistent across Love's official page, FindTruckService, TruckStopsAndServices and Yelp. Located at exit 93, within the segment's exit 0-96 range (northern boundary). Corroborated by 4 sources.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #225, Evergreen
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #225, I-65 Exit 93, Evergreen.
listings.corroboration: CAT scale at Love's #225 confirmed by 4RoadService, FindTruckService and TruckStopsAndServices. catscale.com locator blocked; corroborated by 3 independent sources.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care #225, Evergreen
listings.description: Love's Truck Care center co-located at Love's #225, I-65 Exit 93. Tire repair/sales (Hankook, Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retreads), light mechanical, oil change and 24-hour roadside assistance.
listings.corroboration: Love's Truck Care at #225 confirmed by 4RoadService, FindTruckService and Trucker Guide. Corroborated by 3 independent sources.

listings.name: Spirit Travel Center
listings.description: Independent travel center on I-65 at Exit 96 (AL-83, Evergreen), northern boundary of the segment. Reported 50 truck parking spaces, 3 showers, trucker lounge, ATM, on-site motel, truck repair and tire repair, plus fast-food (Subway and others).
listings.corroboration: Name, address (192 Hwy 83), phone, exit 96 and amenities consistent across ParkAdvisor, AllStays, FindStoreNearMe and TruckerAdvisor. Note: a nearby directory name 'McIntyre Travel Center' at 193 Hwy 83 appears to refer to the same or an immediately adjacent site (possible former name); current identity taken as Spirit Travel Center per 4 sources.

listings.name: Conecuh County Rest Area (Northbound)
listings.description: ALDOT rest area on I-65 Northbound near Evergreen, Conecuh County, approx. mile marker 84.2. Has separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, water, picnic tables and RV dump. Held pending confirmation of legal overnight truck parking.
listings.hold_reason: Existence, direction (NB), mile marker ~84.2 and truck access corroborated by rest-area directories and an ALDOT-listed contact number, but ALDOT official page is blocked by egress policy and LEGAL overnight-parking status is not independently confirmed. Not assuming overnight parking from truck-space presence.
listings.corroboration: Direction and MM corroborated by two rest-area directories plus an ALDOT-published Conecuh NB phone (251-966-2505). Overnight legality unverified.

listings.name: Conecuh County Rest Area (Southbound)
listings.description: ALDOT rest area on I-65 Southbound near Evergreen, Conecuh County, approx. mile marker 89.1. Has separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, water, picnic tables and RV dump. Held pending confirmation of legal overnight truck parking.
listings.hold_reason: Existence, direction (SB), mile marker ~89.1 and truck access corroborated by rest-area directories and an ALDOT-listed contact number, but ALDOT official page is blocked by egress policy and LEGAL overnight-parking status is not independently confirmed. Not assuming overnight parking from truck-space presence.
listings.corroboration: Direction and MM corroborated by two rest-area directories plus an ALDOT-published Conecuh SB phone (251-578-4705). Overnight legality unverified.

listings.name: Qualawash / tank trailer wash, Saraland
listings.description: Reported tank/trailer cleaning facility near I-65 Exit 13 in Saraland. Held: appears to be a tank-container cleaning operation rather than a general exterior truck wash, and identity/category-fit is single-sourced.
listings.hold_reason: Category-fit and current identity/operating status not independently confirmed (single directory source). Likely tank-container cleaning, not a general truck/trailer wash; name and status need corroboration.

excluded.name: TA Mobile (Grand Bay)
excluded.reason: Located on I-10 at Exit 4 (9201 Grand Bay Wilmer Rd), ~15 mi west of the I-65/I-10 interchange serving I-10 traffic, not I-65. Out of segment.

excluded.name: Buc-ee's / Loxley truck facilities
excluded.reason: Baldwin County facilities are on I-10, not on I-65 in this segment.

excluded.name: Satsuma Chevron
excluded.reason: Roadside Chevron fuel/C-store ~1.4 mi off Exit 19; truck-stop/truck-parking status and category-fit not confirmed.

excluded.name: Bubba's Food Store
excluded.reason: C-store near Exit 19/22; not a confirmed truck facility.

excluded.name: Diamond Gasoline #21
excluded.reason: Fuel/C-store near Exit 54; truck-facility identity and status single-sourced/unconfirmed.

excluded.name: RJ's (Hwy 21)
excluded.reason: Store/deli; truck-facility category-fit not confirmed, single source.

excluded.name: McIntyre Travel Center
excluded.reason: Directory name at 193 Hwy 83 appears to be the same or immediately adjacent site as Spirit Travel Center (192 Hwy 83); excluded to avoid duplicate listing.

excluded.name: Diamond Gas (16070 Hwy 84)
excluded.reason: Fuel/C-store near Exit 93; not a confirmed distinct truck facility, single source.

excluded.name: Truck Parking Club lot (300 Ewing Lane)
excluded.reason: User-hosted paid parking listing; existence/legitimacy not independently corroborated (single source).

excluded.name: Atmore truck wash (970 Woods Rd)
excluded.reason: Unnamed truck-wash entry, single source; identity and operating status unconfirmed.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash
excluded.reason: Nearest Blue Beacon is in Cottondale (north Alabama), far outside the segment.

excluded.name: Physical weigh station on I-65 (exits 0-96)
excluded.reason: No permanent physical weigh station in this range could be confirmed; Alabama relies largely on weigh-in-motion/mobile enforcement. ALDOT/ALEA and coopsareopen pages blocked by egress policy. Omitted rather than guessed.
